overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tropical beach settlement with beached ships and tribal structures. The scene features bright midday lighting with clear skies and scattered NPCs walking around the sandy encampment.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal beach settlement with beached vessel

events.description: character transitions from standing to walking forward through the settlement
camera pans left revealing the ocean and shoreline rocks in the background

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking slowly through the beach settlement, observing the surroundings and passing by tribal structures

notable_agents.action: standing still facing the protagonist, then beginning to walk away

entered.detail: large wooden shipwreck with tattered sails and tribal decorations beached on the sand
dark rocky cliff face with wooden platforms, scaffolding, and tribal carvings
tall wooden pole with hanging red and white tribal lanterns and decorations
rustic wooden support beams and platforms part of the settlement construction
tropical palm trees visible in the background against the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit tribal beach settlement with a large beached vessel in the center. Aloy begins walking through the sandy encampment, passing wooden scaffolding and a decorated lantern post. The camera slowly pans left, gradually revealing the ocean shoreline and rocky outcroppings in the distance while an NPC stands in the middle ground before walking away.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach shoreline with ocean view

events.description: character walks past the decorated lantern post, moving closer to the shoreline
additional NPCs become visible walking along the beach in the distance

agents.ego_description: Aloy continues walking along the beach toward the water, passing by the lantern post and approaching the rocky shoreline

notable_agents.action: walking along the beach from left to right, passing in front of the protagonist

entered.detail: blue ocean water with gentle waves lapping against the shore
dark rocky outcroppings along the shoreline leading into the water
small red lantern sitting on the rocks near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open beach view as Aloy moves past the central settlement area. The ocean becomes prominently visible on the left with waves breaking against rocky outcroppings. The beached vessel shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera continues panning left, revealing additional NPCs walking along the shoreline and a small red lantern perched on the rocks near the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit tribal beach settlement that gradually opens up to reveal a wide view of the ocean shoreline. It begins with Aloy walking through the sandy encampment past wooden scaffolding and a decorated lantern post, with a large beached vessel dominating the center. As the camera slowly pans left, the settlement structures recede to the right, gradually unveiling rocky outcroppings and the breaking waves of the coast. The scene then expands into a more open beach vista, where the focus shifts from the interior of the camp to the shoreline as NPCs walk along the sand. Finally, the movement settles on the interaction between the land and sea, highlighting a small red lantern perched on the rocks near the water's edge.
